goal: Deliver deployable platform foundation with read-only Firefly integration, OIDC UI shell, and Grafana datasource provisioning.
scope: Docker Compose profiles minimal/standard/full/oidc without embedded PostgreSQL
External PostgreSQL config and startup retry
Rust/Axum backend health and JWT-protected API skeleton
Firefly GET-only connector and sync scheduler
React UI shell with OIDC and Sync Status pages
Read-only integration test and operator user guide
risks: Accidental Firefly writes — GET-only enforcement and integration test
Large initial sync — progress UI in Sync Status
Linux host DB connectivity — host-gateway in Compose
